subcodes.first_line: O ye real friends of Abdu'l-Baha! The letter of Miss Doring was perused. Praise be to God, it had the glad-tidings of your firmness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی عبدالبهاء نامه مس دورینگ قرائت گردید الحمد لله بشارت ثبوت
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @growth of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God
